heading: How It Works
subtitle: Booking Tequila Mockingbirds is simple. We handle everything from the bar setup to the cleanup, so you can focus on enjoying the party.

steps.title: Tell us about your event
steps.description: Send an enquiry with your date, location, and guest numbers. We'll get back to you with a tailored quote within 24 hours.

steps.title: Choose your line‑up
steps.description: Select from our signature frozen serves, classic margaritas, and delicious mocktails to build your perfect drink menu.

steps.title: We roll up and serve
steps.description: We arrive early to set up our beautiful mobile bar, prepare the garnishes, and start serving frozen perfection to your guests.
